title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at HDFC Securities

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at HDFC Securities
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
